case_title: ROBERT C. GEBHARDT VS. CITIBANK N.A.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (ADAM KNOTT, PERSONAL BANKER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEBHARDT, ROBERT C. AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK N.A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAY-09-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK N.A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEBHARDT, ROBERT C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITIBANK N.A. THE PARTIES ACKNOWLEDGE THAT DEFENDANT HAS A RIGHT TO OFFSET AS TO THE FORGED CHECK. DEFENDANT FOLLOWED REASONABLE VERIFICATION AND COLLECTION PRACTICES CONSISTENT WITHIN THE BANKING BUSINESS AND MET ITS DUY OF CARE TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-01-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK N.A.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITIBANK N.A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-30-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT C. GEBHARDT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. CT CORPORATION SYSTEM IS NOT THE AGENT OF PROCESS IN CALIFORNIA FOR DEFENDANT CITIBANK. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT C. GEBHARDT AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE ANDRE HALMON, VICE-PRESIDENT & CLIENT SERVICE TEAM LEADER AT CITIBANK, N.A. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
